rule_text: Contractors for works exceeding Rs.1.00 crore estimated contract value are permitted to avail Mobilization Advance up to 10% of contract value against an unconditional and irrevocable Bank Guarantee.
source_clause: GO Ms No 57 / Water Resources (Reforms) Dept dated 27-11-2024 read with Para-17 Annexure-I of GO Ms No 94/2003 (I&CAD)
condition_when: TenderState=AndhraPradesh AND TenderType IN [Works, EPC] AND EstimatedValue>10000000
verification_method: Check tender BDS/SCC: mobilization_advance_pct <= 10 AND BG validity covers full MA recovery period AND BG is unconditional+irrevocable

rule_text: Mobilization Advance is permitted only against an unconditional Bank Guarantee that remains valid until the entire MA is recovered from the contractor.
source_clause: GO Ms No 57 / Water Resources (Reforms) Dept dated 27-11-2024, Para 7(i)
verification_method: Check BG validity_end >= contract MA-recovery completion date AND BG is unconditional

rule_text: Mobilization Advance BG must include a time-frame for encashment if the contractor fails to commence work without valid reasons.
source_clause: GO Ms No 57 / Water Resources (Reforms) Dept dated 27-11-2024, Para 7(ii)
verification_method: Check tender contains BG-encashment-trigger clause tied to non-commencement of work

rule_text: Interest on pending Mobilization Advance must be charged at the prevailing one-year MCLR of State Bank of India (9% w.e.f. 15-Nov-2024).
source_clause: GO Ms No 57 / Water Resources (Reforms) Dept dated 27-11-2024, Para 7(iii)
verification_method: Check tender specifies MA interest = SBI 1-year MCLR (current 9%); reject lower or unspecified rates

rule_text: GO Ms No 57/2024 restores the Mobilization Advance provision that was cancelled by GO Ms No 83 dated 17-12-2019; the 2019 cancellation is no longer in force for new works.
source_clause: GO Ms No 57 / Water Resources (Reforms) Dept dated 27-11-2024, Para 7
verification_method: For tenders issued post-27-Nov-2024, MA is permissible; for tenders dated 17-Dec-2019 to 26-Nov-2024 MA was disallowed (verify via NIT date)
